message:
feat(fcp-e2e): Expand E2E test binary with host connector integration support

Enhance the fcp-e2e test harness for more comprehensive integration testing:

fcp-e2e Binary Enhancements:
- Add new test scenarios for host connector integration
- Expand command-line interface with additional test options
- Improve test output formatting and error reporting
- Add support for running targeted test subsets

fcp-e2e Library:
- Minor API adjustments for better ergonomics
- Improve test helper utilities

fcp-host:
- Add new dependency in Cargo.toml for host connector testing
- Add tests/host_connector_integration.rs for integration test coverage

fcp-oauth:
- Minor OAuth2Client code adjustments
- Improve error handling consistency

Documentation:
- Update docs/testing/e2e_log_schema.md with new log fields
- Document additional event types for host connector scenarios

Beads:
- Sync issue tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -84,3 +84,15 @@ The validator lives in `crates/fcp-e2e/src/logging.rs` as:
 
 These checks enforce the required fields and minimal typing guarantees so
 E2E logs are always parsable by downstream tooling.
+
+CLI Validation
+--------------
+
+Use the fcp-e2e CLI to validate script-generated JSONL logs:
+
+```bash
+fcp-e2e --validate-log scripts/e2e/out/e2e_happy_path.jsonl
+```
+
+The CLI will exit non-zero on the first invalid line and print a line number
+plus the schema violation.
